summary: Tested Graupner Suite v37 - Vorname/Nachname display in Kunden and Anfragen pages. Found and fixed 2 bugs: (1) Anfragen list avatar used legacy name instead of vorname, (2) Edit modal save button was disabled based on legacy name field instead of vorname/nachname.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AnfragenPage.jsx line 614 - Avatar in list view was using anfrage.name instead of vorname/nachname with fallback
FIXED: AnfragenPage.jsx line 1383 - Edit modal save button was disabled based on !editForm.name instead of checking vorname/nachname/firma
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data (TestVorname TestNachname, Max Mustermann)
context_for_next_testing_agent: v37 Vorname/Nachname display features fully tested and working. Two bugs were fixed: (1) Anfragen list avatar now correctly uses vorname?.charAt(0) with fallback to nachname then name, (2) Edit modal save button now checks vorname/nachname/firma instead of legacy name field. All features verified: Kunden list/detail shows Vorname/Nachname separately, Anfragen list/detail shows Vorname/Nachname separately, Edit/Create modals have Anrede/Vorname/Nachname fields, Search works with Vorname/Nachname, Legacy data with only 'name' field displays correctly as fallback.

kunden_list_view.details: Shows 'Max Mustermann' with avatar 'M' from Vorname. Search by Vorname/Nachname works.

kunden_detail_view.details: Shows separate fields: Anrede: Herr, Vorname: Max, Nachname: Mustermann

anfragen_list_view.details: Shows 'TestVorname TestNachname' with avatar 'T' from Vorname. Legacy data shows combined name with fallback.

anfragen_detail_modal.details: Shows separate fields: Anrede: Herr, Vorname: TestVorname, Nachname: TestNachname. Legacy data shows Name field as fallback.

anfragen_edit_modal.details: Has Anrede dropdown, Vorname field, Nachname field. Save button enabled when vorname/nachname/firma provided.

anfragen_create_modal.details: Has Anrede dropdown, Vorname field, Nachname field, Kundentyp dropdown.

search_functionality.details: Both Kunden and Anfragen search correctly filter by Vorname and Nachname.

legacy_data_fallback.details: Old data with only 'name' field displays correctly using fallback logic.

bugs_fixed.issue: Anfragen list avatar used legacy name instead of vorname
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed from anfrage.name?.charAt(0) to anfrage.vorname?.charAt(0) || anfrage.nachname?.charAt(0) || anfrage.name?.charAt(0)

bugs_fixed.issue: Edit modal save button disabled based on legacy name field
